title: potentilla recta f. astracanica
intro: Potentilla recta f. astracanica, also known as the tall cinquefoil, is a perennial plant species belonging to the rose family. Its medicinal properties have been utilized in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, wounds, and digestive issues, due to its antiseptic, antiviral, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Potentilla recta f. astracanica include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
